heading: Atlas Kubernetes Operator Migration
body:
The [Atlas Kubernetes Operator](atlas/operator) supports Flex clusters.

To manage Flex clusters, you must use Atlas Kubernetes Operator 2.12.0 or later. This version is free of serverless dependencies.

- You can create and manage Flex clusters using the `AtlasDeployment`
  Custom Resources. To learn more, see
  the [AtlasDeployment](atlas/operator/current/atlasdeployment-custom-resource) custom
  resource in the Atlas Kubernetes Operator documentation.

- Use `spec.flexSpec` in the `AtlasDeployment` Custom Resource
  to configure Flex clusters.

- `M2`/`M5` clusters and Serverless instances are no longer
  supported. All existing instances have been migrated to Flex clusters
  or other cluster types.
